exa.note: Exa Search MCP. Default-on tools: web_search_exa, web_fetch_exa. web_search_advanced_exa (category/domain/date/highlights/subpage filters) is required for production GTM company, people, and lead-generation research. Optional only for exploratory/free-plan lookup. Deprecated but still callable for backward compatibility: company_research_exa, people_search_exa, crawling_exa, linkedin_search_exa, get_code_context_exa, deep_search_exa. Free plan works without a key (rate-limited). Get an API key at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys and replace YOUR_EXA_API_KEY in host MCP settings before production runs.

websets.note: Exa Websets MCP. Persistent company/person sourcing with criteria verification, enrichments, imports, webhooks, async events, and reusable GTM pools for recurring routines. 22 tools across 6 groups: webset (create/list/get/update/delete/preview), items (list/get), search (create/get/cancel), enrichment (create/get/cancel), webhook (create/list/get/update/delete), imports (create/get/list/list_events). Get an API key at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys and replace YOUR_EXA_API_KEY before tools appear. If the host cannot pass Authorization headers, configure the URL as https://websetsmcp.exa.ai/mcp?exaApiKey=YOUR_EXA_API_KEY. Monitors are NOT exposed via MCP yet; use the REST API at https://api.exa.ai/websets/v0/monitors or the dashboard at https://dashboard.exa.ai/playground/create-websets.
